title: Consiliency projections index (projections.index.v1)
description: A deterministic pure-merge index of per-artifact projection manifests (+ portal_projection.v2 envelopes + refresh sidecars). Carries NO generated_at / generated_at_commit so a --check rebuild is byte-identical across source commits that touch no manifest (determinism). Per-entry pinned_commit carries the meaningful provenance. The wire schema id is 'projections.index.v1' (non-namespaced, per DESIGN §2.3 — the interchangeability wire value the producer emits) while the file and loader key follow the package's hyphen/snake conventions.

branch.description: OPTIONAL pipeline-owned contract branch this projection was generated on (DESIGN §11.1). Omitted keeps the entry a pure function of the manifest per §2.3 / §10.4 (single pin per commit; currency is a display-time comparison, not a per-branch generation matrix). Populated only when the branch is available in the generation context; never required for pure-merge determinism.

refresh_status.description: REFRESH-LAYER field (§5), NOT a manifest verdict. Merged from the committed <artifact>.refresh.json SIDECAR, never from the manifest (manifests are additionalProperties:false single-writer gate records). Absent when no sidecar exists.

display_route.description: Present for certified entries (from portal_projection.v2); null / absent otherwise.
